_purpose: Declares every network destination this deployment may call. build/check-egress.mjs asserts no request succeeds to a destination outside allowed_egress_destinations.

allowed_egress_destinations.description: The founded EpiStack Competition Community, this deployment's default community: 56 claims (25 checked, the mechanical protocol claims plus the submission-decomposition's mechanical register plus the first admitted contribution; 20 constitutive, the submission-decomposition's own vocabulary-kernel definitions carried in by depends-on; 11 asserted, the submission's own evaluative theses across both the founding claims and the decomposed documents, awaiting semantic acceptance), now adopting four shared kinds (measurement, forum, comment, declaration as of the Phase KG-11 submission-decomposition merge).

This deployment's own governance kernel: 20 claims, all twenty checked. Grounding is complete as of Phase KG-4 (claim-20, the extension seam guarantee, entered through the app's own contribution path).
Upstream's math kernel, an EpiStack content corpus for contrast, emitted directly from the pinned submodule.
